name: Tyilinmon

signature_move.name: Shippū Tenshouken
signature_move.description: Swoops from the sky, impaling the opponent with the horn on its head.

description: Said to be an ancient Digimon that was born at the creation of the Digital World , it is a Holy Beast Digimon that has been handed down through legend as boasting strength on par with an Ultimate, even though it is a Perfect. Although it is a Digimon that possesses mighty strength, it deeply detests conflict, and it is said that it will never shed blood. Although it has a deeply compassionate personality that loves everything living in the Digital World, when it is up against a being that commits senseless killings, it is said that it will inflict merciless punishment. Its Special Moves are abruptly swooping from the skies, running through the opponent with the horn on its head ( Shippū Tenshouken ), and using its fast movements to unleash clones and confound the opponent ( Jinsoku no Kokoroe ). Also, Tyilinmon emits an aura, and when it flaps its wings, its " Kaishin no Hadou " is fired off, which guides even its opponents on the path to holiness.
